title: Heterolathus polycephala
intro: Heterolathus polycephala is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various diseases. The bioactive constituents of Heterolathus polycephala include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Heterolathus polycephala is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, which are commonly used to treat fever, gastrointestinal disorders, and respiratory infections.
